creator: bh@izb.knu.ac.kr
text:
This ttf-bengali-fonts is a set of TrueType and OpenType fonts released under the GNU General Public License for the Bengali Language.

WWW: http://savannah.nongnu.org/projects/freebangfont

Fix: The patch is attached as shar format, thanks!
How-To-Repeat: # cd /usr/ports/x11-fonts/ttf-bengali-fonts
# make install
# make package
# make deinstall
# pkg_add ttf-bengali-fonts-1.0.tbz
# make deinstall
# make reinstall
# make package

It works fine.

# portlint -A

looks fine.
